forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the south. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 35 to 55 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the early morning then decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the south. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds west to northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h tending west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then turning northerly in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming west to northwesterly and light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding near the coast. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 30 to 45 km/h turning northerly in the middle of the day then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the north in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h tending westerly 30 to 40 km/h in the middle of the day then decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day then tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding in the southwest. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning. Damaging winds possible in the west. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the early morning then turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm from the late morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 35 to 55 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 40 to 60 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 40 to 60 km/h turning westerly 35 to 50 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the morning then turning northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h turning westerly 35 to 55 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 45 to 65 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 35 to 50 km/h in the early morning then turning northwesterly in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south in the early morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h before dawn then turning west to northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. The chance of a thunderstorm in the early morning. Damaging winds possible. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Woomera. Damaging winds possible south of Woomera. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to northwesterly 40 to 60 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 30.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Damaging winds possible south of Woomera. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Leigh Creek in the late afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible south of Yunta. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 40 km/h increasing to 50 km/h before turning west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 32.
Sun protection 10:30am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of raised dust east of Leigh Creek in the early morning. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Yunta in the late morning. Damaging winds possible about the Gammon Ranges. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 12 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.

Mostly sunny. High chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.

Mostly sunny. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 35 km/h before turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.
